steps.title: Follow the timeline
steps.content: The first sentence gives a 1965 milestone. The second sentence mentions syndicated strips from 1994 and 1996, so the transition must show movement forward in time.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals a restatement, but the second sentence adds new events. Choice B reverses the timeline by saying the later strips came previously. Choice C would introduce examples of a general claim, not later developments after a milestone. The answer is D.
